div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TiDB：全开源（外键 v8.5.0 GA、存储过程/触发器均开源）

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OceanBase：CE 仅 MySQL 模式；Oracle 模式属企业版/Cloud

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TiDB：默认 sql_mode 七项；REPEATABLE-READ 名义下为 Snapshot Isolation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OceanBase：CompatMode 创建时定不可改；非法日期需 _enable_mysql_compatible_dates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TiDB：存储过程解析成 ProcedureInfo 但 executor 无接入，不可执行

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OceanBase：PL 引擎真执行（编译/代码生成/包/异常）

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TiDB：仅 MySQL 单一方言，无 Oracle 模式概念

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OceanBase：租户级 MySQL/Oracle 二选一；CE 仅 MySQL 模式语法前端

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TiDB：MySQL 协议，MySQL 客户端/驱动可直连

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: OceanBase：MySQL 协议；Oracle 模式另有 Oracle 协议面
